decks.notes: This deck focuses on quickly building up a board presence and applying pressure to the opponent with a combination of efficient creatures and low-cost spells. The key strategy is to play aggressively and maintain tempo by utilizing card draw and bounce effects to keep the pressure on the opponent. By maintaining control of the board and continuously drawing into threats, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and secure a quick victory before they can establish their own game plan.

This Mono Green Aggro deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with cards like Llanowar Elves and Earthbender Ascension to deploy powerful threats like Mightform Harmonizer and Sazh's Chocobo. The deck also includes ways to give creatures evasion and protection with Meltstrider's Resolve and Escape Tunnel. By overwhelming the opponent with efficient creatures and mana acceleration, this deck aims to quickly close out games before the opponent can stabilize. Additionally, the deck utilizes cards like Archdruid's Charm and Esper Origins to further enhance its aggressive strategy and outpace opponents.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly establish board presence and overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and spells. The key strategy is to efficiently bounce opponent's threats with cards like Boomerang Basics and Bounce Off while steadily building up your own board with creatures like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off. The deck aims to control the tempo of the game with cheap spells like Burst Lightning and Opt, while utilizing cards like Secret Identity and Stormchaser's Talent to maintain card advantage and pressure the opponent.

This deck focuses on using powerful combination of cards to bring creatures back from the graveyard and overwhelm opponents with a reanimated army. Cards like Shoot the Sheriff and Doomsday Excruciator set up the combo, while cards like Requiting Hex and Superior Spider-Man provide strong reanimation targets. The deck also includes disruption spells like Duress to control the game and protect the combo. Overall, the deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent with a steady stream of powerful creatures.

The main concept of this deck is to aggressively control the board and disrupt the opponent's game plan while efficiently building up your own board presence. By playing powerful creatures like Aang, Swift Savior and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares, along with support cards like Boomerang Basics and Nowhere to Run, you aim to apply constant pressure and maintain control of the battlefield. Utilizing cards like Grim Bauble and Stormchaser's Talent helps to generate card advantage and maintain tempo, ultimately leading to victory through overwhelming aggression and disruption.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and spells. By utilizing efficient card draw and low-cost spells like Burst Lightning and Sleight of Hand, the deck aims to maintain pressure on the opponent while controlling the board with bounce effects like Boomerang Basics. Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off provide additional threats that can quickly close out the game. With a focus on speed and tempo, this UR Aggro deck looks to outpace the opponent and secure victory before they can stabilize.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm your opponent with aggressive creatures and spells. Utilizing cards like Boomerang Basics and Burst Lightning to control the board and deal damage, while also supporting your creatures with buffs like Slickshot Show-Off and Stormchaser's Talent. Eddymurk Crab and Elusive Otter provide solid creatures that can push through your opponent's defenses, while cards like Stock Up and Opt help you dig through your deck for the cards you need. Multiversal Passage and Riverpyre Verge ensure you have the necessary mana to keep the pressure on your opponent.

This deck aims to quickly overwhelm opponents with aggressive red creatures and direct damage spells. It focuses on dealing damage to the opponent as fast as possible, utilizing cards like Shock and Burst Lightning to control the board. The creatures in the deck are mostly low-cost with high attack power, allowing for a fast-paced offensive strategy. The inclusion of cards like Nova Hellkite provide additional late-game threats to ensure victory even if the initial rush doesn't succeed. The deck's strategy is to apply relentless pressure and finish off the opponent before they can recover.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by utilizing a mix of burn spells, card draw, and powerful control tools. The deck focuses on building up resources and outvaluing the opponent through efficient removal and card advantage. With the ability to constantly draw cards and remove threats, this deck aims to outlast opponents and win through attrition. The combination of powerful spells like Combustion Technique and It'll Quench Ya! with card draw engines like Accumulate Wisdom and Artist's Talent allows the deck to effectively control the pace of the game.

This deck focuses on utilizing a combination of spells and creatures to control the game and outvalue the opponent. By using cards like Abandon Attachments and Accumulate Wisdom, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while generating card advantage. Firebending Lesson and Artist's Talent provide removal options, while Gran-Gran and Agna Qel'a offer additional control elements. The deck also includes a variety of utility spells like It'll Quench Ya! and Spell Pierce to further hinder the opponent's strategy. Overall, the deck aims to maintain board control and outlast the opponent in a game of attrition.

The deck focuses on combining powerful graveyard recursion abilities with efficient removal and card draw to overwhelm opponents with a constant stream of powerful threats. By using cards like Requiting Hex and Winternight Stories to return key creatures from the graveyard, while also controlling the board with spells like Deadly Cover-Up and Shoot the Sheriff, the deck aims to create an unbeatable advantage over time. The inclusion of strong finishers like Harvester of Misery and Doomsday Excruciator ensures that the deck can close out games quickly once it gains control of the game.

This deck focuses on establishing a strong board presence quickly, using mana ramp cards like Llanowar Elves and Breeding Pool to play powerful creatures like Gene Pollinator and Brightglass Gearhulk early on. The deck also includes control elements like Seam Rip and Spider-Sense to disrupt the opponent's strategy. With a mix of aggressive creatures and utility spells, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of fast, efficient threats and disruptive plays.

This deck focuses on using a combination of card draw, removal, and counterspells to control the game and prevent the opponent from executing their game plan. The deck includes a mix of Izzet themed cards that synergize well together to create a powerful control shell. By utilizing efficient removal spells, card draw engines, and versatile threats, the deck aims to outvalue the opponent and establish a dominant board presence. With a mix of burn spells, counterspells, and powerful creatures, this deck aims to control the game and dictate the pace of play.

This deck aims to quickly assemble the pieces needed to get Omniscience into play, allowing you to cast your spells for free. The combo pieces include Formidable Speaker, Kavaron, Memorial World, and Uthros, Titanic Godcore to help find and protect Omniscience. Once Omniscience is on the battlefield, you can use your spells such as Marang River Regent, North Wind Avatar, and Ashling, Rekindled to overwhelm your opponent and secure the win. The deck also includes some removal and protection spells to help you survive until you can assemble your combo.

The primary focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and powerful spells, utilizing cards like Sleight of Hand and Opt to draw into threats while controlling the board with bounce spells like Boomerange Basics and Burst Lightning. Riverpyre Verge and Stormchaser's Talent provide additional aggression and versatility. The inclusion of Eddymurk Crab and Wild Ride adds to the deck's potential for disruption and surprise plays. Overall, this deck aims to pressure the opponent early and maintain a relentless assault to secure victory.

This Izzet Control deck focuses on controlling the board through a combination of counterspells, removal, and card advantage. It aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan by countering key spells, removing threats, and generating card advantage through cards like Opt and Winternight Stories. The deck also utilizes efficient creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Hearth Elemental to apply pressure while controlling the game. The key strategy is to outvalue the opponent by efficiently answering their threats and maintaining a strong board presence.
